title: Trying to delete a ›created-model-car‹ relationship where both IDs are invalid
gherkin:
Given "MODEL CAR BRAND" "Hot Wheels" does NOT exist
And "MODEL CAR" "F40 Matchbox" does NOT exist
When the user deletes the "created model car" relationship between "Hot Wheels" and "F40 Matchbox"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
